nasb.text: Fearing that we might run aground somewhere on the rocks, they cast four anchors from the stern and wished for daybreak.

esv.text: And fearing that we might run on the rocks, they let down four anchors from the stern and prayed for day to come.

cnv.text: 他們怕我們會在亂石上擱淺，就從船尾拋下四個錨，期待著天亮。

ccb.text: 他们怕会触礁，就从船尾抛下四个锚，暂停前进，期待天亮。

csbs.text: 他们担心会撞到礁石，就从船尾抛下四个锚，祈盼着天亮。
